name: forge-method-core
description: State-machine runtime for Codex-native AI-driven product, software, creative, and game workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Run state-machine creation workflows inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Forge Method Core is a Codex-native workflow framework for long-horizon creation work. It keeps durable project state in files, loads compact state-machine workflows as skills, validates progress with local evals and evidence, and separates runtime development from projects created with the runtime.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start Forge Method in this workspace.
